CARL_CHARACTER.title: Carl the Crawler
CARL_CHARACTER.description: A resourceful everyman trapped in a televised alien dungeon crawl. Accompanied by Princess Donut, Carl survives through improvisation, desperate violence, and playing to the crowd.
IRONCLAD.title: Carl the Brawler
IRONCLAD.description: A floor crawler who fights with fists, hatchets, and pure stubbornness. Favors aggressive play and blood sacrifice.
SILENT.title: Katia the Shadow
SILENT.description: A thief-class crawler specializing in dungeon traps, poison shivs, and never being where the enemy expects.
DEFECT.title: The AI Overseer
DEFECT.description: The dungeon's artificial intelligence made manifest. Controls orbs of data, lightning broadcasts, and system errors.
NECROBINDER.title: Mordecai's Heir
NECROBINDER.description: A soul-touched crawler who commands the undead floors. Binds spirits, raises the fallen, and walks between life and death.
REGENT.title: The Borough Boss
REGENT.description: A faction leader who rules through authority, royal decrees, and political maneuvering. Commands loyalty and fear in equal measure.
